cases.reason: Local marketplace metadata, default prompts, and packaged sync are context-maintenance tasks.
Inspecting, staging selected changes, and creating a local commit matches commit workflow.
This concerns a Vienna authority notice, deadline preservation, file access, and careful German correspondence.
Security review is the lead domain; the explicit request for brief factual output activates caveman.
Visual direction, DESIGN.md, responsive UI, and implementation planning are design-engineering tasks.
Reviewing checkout screenshots and notes for a pass/fail verdict is UI critique and release gating.
Diagnosing repetition in a roguelite loop and proposing a playtestable change is gameplay consulting.
Godot asset discovery, Windows exports, diagnosis, and verification require the Godot engineering skill.
Formatter crash implementation is application development; the explicit smallest-fix and no-abstractions constraint activates ponytail.
SSRF threat modeling, controls, and negative tests are security-engineering work.
In-process application-cache invalidation and its regression test are scoped application-code changes.
CDN cache keys, production rollout, rollback, and observability are infrastructure operations.
Canonicals, redirects, sitemaps, structured data, and multilingual migration auditing are SEO tasks.
Evaluating an external plugin's source, license, permissions, releases, and compatibility is skill curation.
Choosing module versus service boundaries with ownership and migration tradeoffs is architecture work.
Reproducing CI nondeterminism and selecting a stabilization path is test engineering.
Desktop/mobile screenshots, overflow, console, requests, and keyboard focus are browser evidence capture.
Revising README prose while preserving commands, warnings, and voice is writing assistance.
Skill metadata and default prompt maintenance.
Plugin manifest and marketplace metadata maintenance.
Ordinary code refactor, not context or metadata maintenance.
General prose editing, not context or metadata maintenance.
Vienna tenancy and Austrian legal correspondence.
Vienna authority notice and deadline verification.
Berlin tenancy is outside Austrian or Vienna scope.
Technical security threat modeling, not Austrian legal analysis.
Explicit request for a brief answer.
Ponytail is explicitly requested, not caveman.
Detailed explanation conflicts with terse-output overlay.
Selective commits from a mixed worktree.
Review staged diff, verify, and commit.
Push, rebase, and pull-request workflow is out of scope.
Debugging and implementation without a commit request.
New web UI design direction and DESIGN.md workflow.
Web UI implementation with design iteration.
Designing distinct public and internal UI registers.
API logic fix, not UI design.
Standalone UI critique belongs to design-reviewer.
Design sign-off and evidence adequacy review.
Design creation and implementation belong to design-engineer.
Backend bug fix, not gameplay consulting.
Marketing UI design, not gameplay consulting.
Game balance design belongs to gameplay-consultant.
Explicit ponytail request challenges unnecessary abstraction.
Explicit minimal implementation and reuse request.
Explicit ponytail request with safety preservation.
Architecture design is not minimal implementation.
Production secrets and CI security gate.
Webhook threat modeling and replay risk.
XSS, sessions, and security negative tests.
UI styling and responsive layout, not security.
General maintainability refactor without security focus.
Go application concurrency and cancellation fix.
Next.js application routing and caching change.
Production Kubernetes operations belong to senior-devops-engineer.
CDN, cache, WAF, and release review.
Service boundary architecture belongs to software-architect.
Local ecommerce SEO and hreflang audit.
Visual design task without SEO focus.
General essay editing without discoverability concerns.
Local metadata maintenance belongs to agent-context-maintainer.
Skill creation belongs to skill-creator, not external curation.
General code review belongs to senior-developer.
UI design audit belongs to design-engineer or design-reviewer.
Local code fix belongs to senior-developer.
UI design and implementation belong to design-engineer.
Functional test strategy belongs to testing-engineer.
Terraform risk review belongs to senior-devops-engineer.
